title: Le Moyne men’s lacrosse falls to Robert Morris in NEC matchup
summary: Le Moyne College men's lacrosse team lost 19-4 to Robert Morris University in Northeast Conference play, falling to 2-9 overall and 1-2 in conference. This article reports on a collegiate sports event with no direct relevance to City of Syracuse municipal operations or Chief Innovation Officer priorities.
